caption: A video conference call features eight participants in a grid layout. The participants include a man in a blue shirt and glasses named "Jerry McTull," a man in a green shirt named "Howard Skerman," a man in a blue cap, a woman in a brown jacket, a man in a yellow shirt named "Wong-Gooldman," a woman in a dark shirt named "Dolly," a man in a black shirt named "Scott Needling," and a man in a blue shirt named "Ken Sanders." The participants are in various indoor settings, including home offices and living rooms. Throughout the video, the participants engage in conversation, with some speaking and others listening. "Jerry McTull" is seen gesturing with his hands and holding a mug. "Dolly" is seen leaning in toward the camera. "Scott Needling" is wearing a black t-shirt with a green logo. The screen layout remains constant, though the participants' facial expressions and postures shift as they interact.
